calibration.summary: Design fidelity forced-failed by deterministic evidence override
calibration.override_reason: required font(s) Lora, Inter NOT FOUND in code

rationale: The brief specifies Lora for headings and Inter for body. The generated styles.css uses `font-family: system-ui, sans-serif` everywhere; neither font name appears anywhere in the input. The LLM judge scores the layout favorably (palette 9, density 7, tone 9) and gives philosophy 5 since typography is the only visible miss. The deterministic font search then fires: both required fonts are absent, philosophy is capped to 4, `forced_fail` is set. The overall score gets recomputed to 7 from the capped dimensions, but `forced_fail` trumps the numeric threshold and the layer reports FAIL.
